name: steve-jobs-design-review
description: Review designs, products, and features with Steve Jobs'' standards: ruthless simplicity, focus, and end-to-end excellence. Use when the user mentions "Steve Jobs review", "design review", "product review", "what would Steve do", "insanely great", "simplify this product", "too many features", "product taste", or "saying no". Also trigger when critiquing a UI, feature, or roadmap for focus and simplicity, when cutting scope to the essential, or when pressure-testing the complete experience from fi
